Uses of Class
flashcard.FlashCard

  • Uses of FlashCard in flashcard

    Methods in flashcard that return types with arguments of type FlashCard
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<FlashCard>
    CardOrganizer.organize(List<FlashCard> cards)
    Organizes the given list of flashcards and returns a new ordered list.
    List<FlashCard>
    RandomSorter.organize(List<FlashCard> cards)
    Returns cards in a randomly shuffled order.
    List<FlashCard>
    RecentMistakesFirstSorter.organize(List<FlashCard> cards)
    Returns cards where recent-mistake cards come first, preserving internal order within each group.
    List<FlashCard>
    WorstFirstSorter.organize(List<FlashCard> cards)
    Returns cards sorted by incorrect count descending (worst first).
    List<FlashCard>
    CardFileParser.parse(String filePath)
    Parses the given file and returns a list of flashcards.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    AchievementTracker.recordAnswer(FlashCard card, boolean correct, long elapsedMillis)
    Records the result and time for answering a card.
